name: P:GTA.Math.Matrix.Item(System.Int32,System.Int32)
summary: Gets or sets the component at the specified index.
returns: The value of the component at the specified index.
value: The value of the matrix component, depending on the index.

params.name: row
params.description: The row of the matrix to access.

params.name: column
params.description: The column of the matrix to access.
